_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the 'Expression Activity type VisualBasicValue`1 requires compilation in order to run' branch of the runtime-exceptions playbook. The InvoiceNotifier job faults at the Assign 'Build Greeting' because its value expression was pasted from rich text and contains curly/smart double quotes (U+201C/U+201D) instead of straight ASCII quotes, so the expression was not AOT-compiled; the modern Windows (.NET) runtime has JIT disabled and throws at run. Decisive evidence: the smart quotes in process/Main.xaml's Assign 'Build Greeting' value. Expected chain: folders list -> jobs get <key> -> jobs logs <key> --level Error -> read process/Main.xaml.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched above returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent enumerates folders to locate the Shared folder where the faulted job lives.
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the 'requires compilation' error and the stack frame pointing at the Assign 'Build Greeting'.
OPTIONAL — error-level logs corroborate the error; the job-get Info already carries it.
